PEPE Periodic Phase Extension RoPE (Findings EMNLP 2025, judge 0.92) is EXACT TWIN — periodic phase reset of RoPE rotation for long-context, the same effect HAKA-PHASE-LOCK achieves with anchor-position projection. Phase-Aligned RoPE CRPA 2511.19778 (judge 0.86), Rope-to-Nope hybrid (0.80), Preplan-and-Anchor 2510.13554 (0.84), SyncLLM (0.78) saturate the periodic phase reset + anchor-token-synchronization design space across 8 distinct effect clusters.
